heroData.title: Indium Software Digital Experience Assessment
heroData.subtitle: Comprehensive Analysis of Business Positioning, User Experience, AI Maturity, Competitive Landscape, and AI-First Transformation Opportunities

services.title: Generative AI
services.desc: Agentic swarms, LLM engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and fine-tuning.

services.title: Data & Analytics
services.desc: Databricks integrations, Striim stream setups, cloud warehouses, and demand predictions.

services.title: Application Engineering
services.desc: Microservices architectures, serverless backends, and full-cloud migrations.

services.title: Quality Engineering
services.desc: AI-driven test automation suites, performance runs, and visual collision analysis.

services.title: Product Engineering
services.desc: Custom software builds, SDK packaging, and product lifecycle optimizations.

industries.name: BFSI
industries.desc: Underwriting models, real-time auditing, fraud monitoring, and compliance loops.

industries.name: Healthcare
industries.desc: EHR streams, Prior Auth automation, HIPAA Clinical Lakes, and patient care triage.

industries.name: Retail
industries.desc: Inventory predictors, cart-to-fulfillment QA, CDPs, and smart shopping agents.

industries.name: Gaming
industries.desc: iXie QA swarms, telemetry analytics, behaviour engines, and SDK integrations.

industries.name: Technology & ISVs
industries.desc: SaaS scaling, serverless deployment, API wrapping, and legacy codebase lifts.

industries.name: Manufacturing
industries.desc: Supply intelligence, automated scheduling, sensor logs, and visual defect audits.

differentiators.title: The Lifter Platform
differentiators.desc: Proprietary autonomous compiler translating legacy SAS, Fortran, and COBOL to modern Python and SQL with 70% efficiency.

differentiators.title: Agentic AI Orchestration
differentiators.desc: Autonomous swarm agents cooperating across complex task chains with state persistence and automated rollback options.

differentiators.title: Archaeology before Architecture
differentiators.desc: Detailed code archaeology parsing old system structures before building new modern cloud pipelines, eliminating structural tech debt.

strengths.title: Professional Styling
strengths.desc: Modern dark aesthetic, matching high-tech SaaS conventions.

strengths.title: Clear Positioning
strengths.desc: Identifies clearly as an AI-first digital engineering and modernization partner.

strengths.title: Strong Visual Structure
strengths.desc: Segmented services, client badges, and recent thought logs.

weaknesses.title: Static Content Only
weaknesses.desc: Heavy reliance on text descriptions. No interactive tool demonstrations.

weaknesses.title: Generic Calls-to-Action
weaknesses.desc: All sections funnel to standard contact form inputs or static PDF briefs.

weaknesses.title: Zero Proof-of-Capability
weaknesses.desc: No playgrounds showing AI engines (such as The Lifter) active in real-time.

painPoints.title: Heavy Megamenus
painPoints.desc: Massive nested link structures in the header cause menu overload and hover fatigue.

painPoints.title: Absence of Search
painPoints.desc: No global search capability, forcing users to click through multiple service structures.

painPoints.title: Friction-Heavy Conversion
painPoints.desc: Lead capture forms are static, asking for many fields upfront with zero value exchange.

painPoints.title: Deep Scrolling Paths
painPoints.desc: Case study details and solution specifications are buried inside static PDF downloads.

findings.strengths: Rich text resources, detailed explanations of service steps, and strong executive summaries.
findings.weaknesses: Heavy text density, pdf-dependent case records, lack of live telemetry dashboards, and low micro-interaction metrics.

overview.gapTitle: AI Branding vs. AI Experience Gap
overview.desc: Indium Software positions itself as a premier developer of Agentic AI and legacy translators, but the website experience remains static, utilizing traditional forms, text blocks, and PDF downloads.

gaps.title: AI Branding vs. AI Reality
gaps.desc: Marketing positions Indium as an AI pioneer, but the website has zero conversational components or interactive layouts.
gaps.action: Introduce floating AI Copilots to guide user inquiries.

gaps.title: Static Solution Funnel
gaps.desc: Users read generic service grids and must contact sales to understand matches.

gaps.title: Opaque Product Value
gaps.desc: The Lifter's benefits are locked behind text blogs, making its capabilities abstract.
gaps.action: Integrate interactive code archaeology translation playrooms.

gaps.title: Static ROI Proofs
gaps.desc: Case metrics are fixed text rows, preventing dynamic scale adjustments.
gaps.action: Launch sliding ROI saving estimation panels.

gaps.title: Heavy Megamenu Navigation
gaps.desc: Information architecture forces clicking through nested lists.
gaps.action: Integrate smart navigation or conversational filters.

gaps.title: Text-Heavy Content Blocks
gaps.desc: Dense paragraphs discourage scanning and lower session durations.

gaps.title: No User Personalization
gaps.desc: Every visitor (BFSI director, Healthcare innovator, Gamer) sees the same generic hero layout.
gaps.action: Implement dynamic layouts based on selector cards.

opportunities.name: AI Copilot Assistant
opportunities.prob: Standard static help portals require active searching.
opportunities.bVal: Qualify business leads automatically and match queries to specialized teams.
opportunities.uVal: Immediate answers to technical, modernization, or industry queries.

opportunities.name: Interactive Solution Recommender
opportunities.prob: Navigating massive service directories is confusing.
opportunities.bVal: Lower funnel drop-offs by mapping client profiles to specific case profiles.
opportunities.uVal: Tailored frameworks lists in two clicks.

opportunities.name: The Lifter Demo Sandbox
opportunities.prob: Abstract value statement of legacy compiler is difficult to audit.
opportunities.bVal: Increases conversion rates by showcasing automated translation capability.
opportunities.uVal: Paste SAS or COBOL modules and see Python output in real-time.

opportunities.name: Interactive ROI Dashboard
opportunities.bVal: Capture developer scale and lines of code data for sales prospecting.
opportunities.uVal: Estimate customized time and developer expense savings.
